creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Maybe send announce to maintainers with warning?
That they have to update their ports before 2021-06-20 or port will be removed.

Full list is:
devel/opengrok  ports@FreeBSD.org
www/axis2       dbaio@FreeBSD.org
www/madsonic    root@cooltrainer.org
www/geronimo    ports@FreeBSD.org
devel/gitblit   freebsd@dussan.org
www/jspwiki     ports@FreeBSD.org
www/sakai       wen@FreeBSD.org
graphics/deegree-csw    ports@FreeBSD.org
graphics/deegree-igeoportal     ports@FreeBSD.org
graphics/deegree-wcs    ports@FreeBSD.org
graphics/deegree-wfs    ports@FreeBSD.org
graphics/deegree-wms    ports@FreeBSD.org
graphics/deegree-wps    ports@FreeBSD.org

graphics/barbecue       ports@FreeBSD.org
